description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make an exclusive style statement with this premium watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to class-up your accessory collection! Product Details Case style: Rectangular stainless steel case Dial style: White dial with black indicies and silver and black hands Features: Date aperture at 4 hour mark Strap stype: Steel strap with butterfly clasp Water resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashes Warranty: 1 Year Size: Case diameter: 33 mm Case thickness: 9 mm
